## Component: HEADER BAND (CP-STR-01)

Full-width page header: title left, meta (date, page, reference) right, ruled base.

### Geometry (px, follow literally)

```json
{
  "h": 52,
  "pad": 16,
  "title_size": 18,
  "title_dy": 33,
  "meta_size": 10,
  "rule_h": 2
}
```

### Color roles

| Element | Role chain |
|---|---|
| band_bg | panel -> background |
| rule | primary |
| title | ink |
| meta | body |

### Rules
- meta in caps, right-aligned, letter-spaced
- the primary rule anchors the band to the page
- title in the display font

### QA
- [ ] meta caps right
- [ ] rule present
- [ ] one band per page
